title: Thank You
writer: Winchell Smith, Tom Cushing, Frances Marion
actors: George O'Brien, Jacqueline Logan, J. Farrell MacDonald
plot: Young Kenneth Jamieson's millionaire father, fed up with his son's wild escapades, sends him to stay on a chicken farm in the small village of Dedham. On the day he arrives there pretty Diane Lee, the niece of local Rev. David Lee...
